1779120.name: Inari's Tale
1779120.description:
Inari's Tale is a 2D story-driven hand-drawn platformer set in the mythical origins of Japan. You play Inari, starting as a tadpole. As you grow in power, you grow limbs and add to your skills.
Get ready to discover the secrets of the gods, earn a place among them, and change the world.

  • Hand-drawn scenery
  • Traditional animation
  • Over 100 unique levels
  • Many secrets rewarding exploration
  • Unlockable super hard bonus levels
  • Unlockable character skins
  • Unlockable abilities
  • Unlockable cosmetic upgrades
  • Full Controller Support
1779120.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
